```{.r .cell-code}
library(tidytuesdayR)
library(janitor)
```

```

Attaching package: 'janitor'

The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':

    chisq.test, fisher.test
```

:::

```{.r .cell-code}
df <- tt_load("2026-02-17")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
---- Compiling #TidyTuesday Information for 2026-02-17 ----
--- There is 1 file available ---


── Downloading files ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  1 of 1: "dataset.csv"
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
df <- df[[1]]

df %>% write_csv(here::here("tidytuesday", "2026-02-17_sheep", "data.csv"))
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
farms <- df %>%
  filter(measure %in% c("Total Area of Farms", "Plantations of Exotic Trees", "Wine grapes"))

farms %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year_ended_june, y = value, colour = measure)) +
  geom_line()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
area <-  df %>%
  filter(value_label == "Hectares") %>%
  filter(value > 1000000)

options(scipen = 999)

area %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year_ended_june, y = value, colour = measure)) +
  geom_line() +
  ggeasy::easy_remove_legend()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-2.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
 sheep_dairy <- df %>%
  filter(measure %in% c("Total Sheep", "Total Dairy Cattle (including Bobby Calves)"))

sheep_dairy %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year_ended_june, y = value, colour = measure)) +
  geom_line()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
df %>%
  tabyl(measure)
```

:::

```{.r .cell-code}
distinct <- df %>%
  distinct(measure) %>%
  arrange(measure)
```
:::





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
fruit_measures <- c(
  "Feijoas",
  "Grapefruit/Goldfruit",
  "Kiwifruit",
  "Lemons",
  "Macadamias",
  "Mandarins",
  "Melons (Water and Rock)",
  "Nectarines",
  "Nuts",
  "Olives (net area planted)",
  "Oranges",
  "Passionfruit",
  "Peaches",
  "Pears (excluding Asian Pears)",
  "Persimmons",
  "Plums",
  "Raspberries",
  "Strawberries",
  "Tamarillos",
  "Tangelos",
  "Walnuts",
  "Wine grapes"
)

df_fruit <- df %>%
  filter(measure %in% fruit_measures)

df_fruit %>%
  filter(measure %in% c("Wine grapes", "Kiwifruit")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year_ended_june, y = value, colour = measure)) +
  geom_line() +
  ggeasy::easy_remove_legend()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
flower_measures <- c(
  "Flowers and Foliage (Outdoor)",
  "Hydrangea",
  "Orchids",
  "Peony",
  "Perennials (Indoor)",
  "Perrenials (outdoor)"
)

df_flowers <- df %>%
  filter(measure %in% flower_measures)
```
:::
